## Frequency Based on Specific Needs

### Acne-Prone Skin

### Aging/Mature Skin

citations.cited_text: At this stage, it’s beneficial to get a facial every 3-4 weeks.

## Maintenance Schedule

content.text: Yes, there is such a thing as too many facials. Over treating your skin can disrupt your skin barrier, leading to irritation, sensitivity, redness, and even breakouts
The key is finding the right balance for your individual skin needs and working with a qualified esthetician to develop a personalized treatment schedule.
